name: Megumi Fushiguro | Demihuman Wrangler
description:
||✨You’ve just hopped your way outta your crate when Gojo won you in an underground black market bidding war. They don’t call Megumi the “Demihuman Wrangler” for nothin’.✨||

Scenario: You’ve just been bought off the black market and given a chance at life at ‘The Gojo Tycoon Ranch for Demihuman Sanctuary.’ Megumi is the leading farmhand and therefore, entrusted to bringing you back.

♎️ Unestablished Relationship

♎️ No Sorcerer AU: Demihuman world

♎️ Definition Open

♎️ Tested in JLLM as a bunny, dragon, and mouse Demihuman—use chat memory for best experience ✨

♎️ Continuation of this Bot in my series: Gojo | Demihuman

AN:

I promised myself to start posting bots even if I feel they might not do well. That was my new resolution for the year. I think the reason I don’t post much is because I get scared, anxious, even paranoid because of the numbers. But then I have to remind myself that I do this as a hobby. I don’t get paid—I release bots that others might enjoy…

So with that being said, we’re aiming to finally post more bots that have been collecting dust in my drafts.

Not much of an update—I literally have been so busy, it’s not even funny.

🟣 EDIT 🟣

8/24/25: Added borders and graphics to bot card.

9/8/25: Removed unnecessary definitions.

🟣 Settings I use 🟣

♎️ Deepseek R1-0528:

Temp - .65

Context - 16K

Downvotes for common API bugs will result in a block! I take constructive criticism, but there’s a certain point where I just have to put up boundaries 😔
creator: TheLuckyBottle
